name: Drug Lord Tycoon
short_description: Start from nothing and rise to the top as you expand your criminal empire in Drug Lord Tycoon.
detailed_description:
Start from nothing and rise to the top as you expand your criminal empire in Drug Lord Tycoon. You'll begin as a low-level street hustler working out of a tiny back-alley garage, hustling the streets on your own. With aspirations of power and wealth you rise through the ranks, hire workers, dealers, and gain access to powerful contacts in the criminal underworld.

Becoming a successful kingpin is not easy, and there are a lot of risks and dangers you have to take into account. Avoiding police, rival drug cartels, and insane partners, is all a part of running a drug empire. So be careful who you mess with, or become powerful enough to become the danger!

Starting an empire isn’t easy work, and without any connections to the criminal world, you will have to put in some work yourself. Start out by hustling the streets with your product, negotiate with stubborn customers or charge extra from drunk partygoers.

Once word is on the street that there is a new supplier in town, dealers will start to show up. Use them to deal your product while you take care of more important things.

Crossbreed plants and experiment with new recipes. Make your drug your own, get the best traits or show off a signature ingredient or trait. You can customize your drugs however you want.

Growth in this business doesn’t come without its challenges. Once your production scales you won't be able to keep up on your own. Hire workers to help you out. Each worker possesses a unique level of skill for different tasks, it’s your job as the manager of your empire to assign the tasks in the most optimal way. Experiment with task priorities and amounts to see which combination fits your production line the best.
